hero.subtitle: An interactive operating system built in the browser — not a metaphor, a working subsystem.

panels.title: Problem
panels.body: Traditional portfolios show work. ROOT OS lets visitors operate it: boot sequence, terminal, GUI apps, easter eggs, and a narrative shutdown arc. The challenge was making depth accessible without gating content behind CLI literacy.

panels.title: Architecture
panels.body: Two synchronized layers: a landing-first scroll experience and an optional terminal subsystem. Boot cinema (R3F + CRT shader), xterm.js parser with VFS, GSAP window manager, and JSON/MD content — zero hardcoded copy in components.
panels.code:
Landing ←→ SyncBus ←→ Terminal
         ↓
    Window Manager
         ↓
    /content JSON

panels.title: Pipeline
panels.body: Visitor flow: optional boot cinema → landing scroll → project cards → WM apps OR terminal commands. Session state persists via Zustand. Shutdown arc closes the narrative loop. Every surface emits sync events for bidirectional CLI integration.

panels.title: Stack
panels.body: Next.js 15 App Router · TypeScript strict · Tailwind CSS v4 · GSAP + ScrollTrigger · Motion · Lenis · React Three Fiber · xterm.js · Zustand · AsciiInteractionEngine (custom canvas physics).

panels.title: Key Decisions
panels.body: ADR-010 Landing-first: navigation never blocked by terminal. ADR-012 Projects as applications evolved into dedicated case-study routes. ADR-016 Single AsciiInteractionEngine library — influence fields, not mouse-coupled physics.

panels.title: Performance
panels.body: prefers-reduced-motion fast paths across Lenis, GSAP reveals, and ASCII physics. Active-set culling on character grid. Dirty-rect canvas rendering. Code-split WM and terminal. Target LCP < 2.5s on landing.

panels.title: ASCII Interaction
panels.body: Influencers emit scalar fields → physics integrates spring/damping per character → glyphs evolve and restore elastically. Home position is permanent. No GSAP on character positions — organic return via residual energy decay (800–2000ms).
